docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY EISENBERG, REBECCA AS TO DEFENDANT DIGTAL MOGUL UBERBABE MEDIA INC. VOLDENG, LISA KLOPPENBERG, LAURA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-30-2001 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DIGTAL MOGUL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EISENBERG, REBECCA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DIGTAL MOGUL UBERBABE MEDIA INC. VOLDENG, LISA KLOPPENBERG, LAURA $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,045.00, DIGITAL MOGUL, LISA VOLBERG, AND LAURA KLOPPENBERG ARE DISMISSED WITHOYT PREJUDICE. UBERBABE MEDIA IS AMENDED TO UBERBABE MEDIA INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT UBERBABE MEDIA INC. HEARING SET FOR SEP-24-2001 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS OF SEP-24-2001, GRANTED
UNTIL THE JUDGMENT IS FULLY PAID.
